extension.description: Homepage: github.com/forbxy[CR]Features:[CR]1. LRU block cache: optimizes network ISO movie parsing, playback starts in seconds[CR]2. Read-ahead buffer: with default settings, 10s+ network fluctuations are imperceptible[CR]- For STRM usage, see STRM format requirements on the homepage vfs.stream.fast[CR]- For Emby integration, emby-next-gen requires a modified version, see homepage plugin.service.emby-next-gen

主页:github.com/forbxy[CR]特点:[CR]1.LRU块缓存：优化网络iso电影解析速度，起播只需数秒[CR]2.预读数据：默认参数下，10秒+的网络波动用户无感知[CR]-！如需使用strm，对STRM文件的格式要求见主页vfs.stram.fast[CR]-！如需接入emby，emby-next-gen只能使用修改版，具体见主页plugin.service.emby-next-gen
